stimulus: In 1965, Mexican muralist Pablo O'Higgins captured scenes of laborers and farmworkers in three vivid lithographs: Workers of the Field, Harvest at Dawn, and The Stonecutter. In 2018, ______blank displayed alongside dozens of O'Higgins's other prints in a retrospective at the Museo Nacional de Arte in Mexico City.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The convention being tested is pronoun-antecedent agreement. The plural pronoun "they" agrees in number with the plural antecedent "lithographs" and clearly identifies what was displayed at the Museo Nacional de Arte.

Choice A is incorrect because the singular pronoun "that" doesn't agree in number with the plural antecedent "lithographs." Choice B is incorrect because the singular pronoun "it" doesn't agree in number with the plural antecedent "lithographs." Choice D is incorrect because the pronoun "some" is illogical in this context (referring to "some" of three lithographs).
